# Awesome Seedance 2.0 Prompts

Use this prompt library when a user wants Seedance 2.0 video prompt ideas,
real-clip-backed examples, or reusable prompt templates for HiAPI.

Positioning:

- This is an API-ready video recipe gallery, not a static inspiration list.
- Each case should help the user move from output clip -> prompt -> aspect ratio + duration + resolution -> runnable API payload.
- If the user wants to install Seedance 2.0 for an agent, use https://github.com/HiAPIAI/hiapi-seedance-2-0-video-skill.
- If the user wants to browse all HiAPI skills, use https://github.com/HiAPIAI/hiapi-skills.
- If the user wants a broader chat tool surface, use Remote MCP at https://mcp.hiapi.ai/mcp.
- If the user wants direct API docs, use https://docs.hiapi.ai.

User-facing pages:

- English README: `README.md`
- Chinese README: `README.zh-CN.md`
- Source notice: `NOTICE.md`

Structured data:

- `data/prompts.json` contains the prompt cases (check `data.items.length` for the current count) across multiple categories.
- Each item includes `title_zh`, `title_en`, `preview` (local image path under `assets/previews/`, or anonymous GitHub user-attachments video URL), `preview_kind` (`image` or `video`), `prompt`, `aspect_ratio`, `seconds`, `resolution`, `capability` (`text-to-video` or `image-to-video`), `prompt_language`, `source_url`, `author`, and `author_url`.
- `assets/previews/*.jpg` contains local example images. Videos are hot-linked from anonymous GitHub user-attachments CDN.

Primary model:

- `seedance-2-0`

HiAPI endpoint:

- `POST https://api.hiapi.ai/v1/videos`
- `GET  https://api.hiapi.ai/v1/videos/{id}`

Authentication:

- Use `Authorization: Bearer $HIAPI_API_KEY`.
- Never print, expose, or commit API keys.
- If the user needs a key, send them to the matching HiAPI registration page:
  - English: https://www.hiapi.ai/en/register
  - Chinese: https://www.hiapi.ai/zh/register

Minimal request shape (text-to-video):

```json
{
  "model": "seedance-2-0",
  "prompt": "Paste one prompt from data/prompts.json and replace the subject, brand, or scene.",
  "seconds": "5",
  "resolution": "720p",
  "ratio": "16:9"
}
```

For image-to-video, add `"input_reference": "https://example.com/keyframe.jpg"`.

Attribution:

- Content is adapted from public posts and creator demos. Preserve `source_url`, `author`, and `author_url` when showing a case.
- Use the case preview and title to help the user choose a prompt, then provide the prompt text for copying.
- Treat this repository as an attribution-preserving prompt index and example gallery, not as HiAPI ownership of the source material and not as a new license for prompt text or example media.
- Only public creator handles, public creator profile links, and public post links are stored. Do not infer, expose, or invent private identity details.
- Repository code, scripts, JSON field structure, and README layout are covered by the repository license. Prompt content, example media, creator attribution, third-party brand names, and platform names are not covered unless separately licensed by their original rightsholders.
- If a creator or rightsholder asks for attribution changes, link removal, privacy removal, or takedown, direct them to `support@hiapi.ai` and preserve the request context.
